steps.title: Track the parade sequence
steps.content: The passage first describes original ticker tape in 1924, then says that by the 2019 parade the original ticker tape had been retired. The blank introduces what came after that change.

steps.title: Rule out nonsequence links
steps.content: A signals restatement, B signals a response made with the prior idea in mind, and C signals addition. The sentence instead needs a transition for the next stage, when shredded standard paper took over. The answer is D.
